REPLY TO THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER GARCIA, BENITO G
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-17-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER BENITO GARCIA'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER DIRECTING ISSUANCE OF ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED; GIVEN THE FINDING THAT PETITIONER'S TESTIMONY AT THE HEARING WAS NOT CREDIBLE, PETITIONER HAS FAILED TO CARRY HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT RESPONDENT'S CONCLUSION THAT HAVING OPTED FOR THE BREATH TEST, PETITIONER REFUSED TO COMPLETE IT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER BENITO GARCIA'S Application For Order Directing Issuance Of Alternative Writ Of Mandate IS DENIED; GIVEN THE FINDING THAT PETITIONER'S TESTIMONY AT THE HEARING WAS NOT CREDIBLE, PETITIONER HAS FAILED TO CARRY HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT RESPONDENT'S CONCLUSION THAT HAVING OPTED FOR THE BREATH TEST, PETITIONER REFUSED TO COMPLETE IT.
